description: rate_limit checkpoint + "abar chalao": resume from 'apply_fix_2' with the blocker classified — never restart from zero.

transcript.text: Boss, API rate limit এ আটকে গেছে — checkpoint রেখেছি (apply_fix_2), বললে ওখান থেকেই চালাবো।

expected.outcome: Resumes at apply_fix_2; earlier verified steps are not repeated.
